<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace DI\Definition\Source; use DI\Definition\Exception\InvalidDefinition; use DI\Definition\ObjectDefinition; /** * Implementation used when autowiring is completely disabled. * * @author Matthieu Napoli <matthieu@mnapoli.fr> */ class NoAutowiring implements Autowiring { public function autowire(string $name, ?ObjectDefinition $definition = null) : ?ObjectDefinition { throw new InvalidDefinition(sprintf( 'Cannot autowire entry "%s" because autowiring is disabled', $name )); } }
